title: FaGraves
description: A mod that adds graves to your server. This is a Fabric port of Axgraves.
body:
>  This is an AI-assisted port of AxGraves. It works, but treat it accordingly.

# FaGraves — Lootable Death Chests

A lightweight grave plugin with lootable death chests. Fork of AxGraves.

## Features
- **Performant** — most operations run asynchronously
- **Simple** — minimal configuration
- **Packet-based** — nothing is stored in the world file
- **World blacklist** — disable graves in specific worlds

## What's different from AxGraves?
-  Developer API is **not supported yet**

## Commands
- `/fagraves reload` — reload the plugin

## Configuration
See `config.yml` after first launch.
